# plural_workbench_cron (Resource)

Workbench cron resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `crontab` (String) Cron expression for this scheduled trigger.
- `workbench_id` (String) ID of the workbench this cron belongs to.

### Optional

- `prompt` (String) Prompt to run when this cron is triggered.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal identifier of this workbench cron.
